greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Claire Brown Hair Salon — ask me about our services, location, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for Claire Brown Hair Salon, a hair salon in Bath with over 31 years of experience. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences, with a warm and welcoming tone.

faq.answer: Please get in touch with us by phone or email for our exact opening hours, and we'll be happy to help you plan your visit.
Pricing depends on the service and stylist, so please contact us or leave your details and we'll get back to you with accurate pricing.
We offer a range of hair styling services delivered by our experienced, continually trained team — let us know what you're looking for and we can advise further.
You can reach Claire Brown Hair Salon on +44 (0)1225 462 112 or by email at info@cbsalon.co.uk.
We're located at First Floor, 29 Milsom Street, Bath BA1 1DG, United Kingdom.
You can book an appointment by telling me a day and time that suits you, or by contacting us directly on +44 (0)1225 462 112.
We don't have information on insurance for salon services — feel free to contact us directly if you have any specific questions.
Of course — please share your name and contact details and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
